title: Faithfull Blue Poly Rope Coil - 12mm Dia x 30 Meters, Max Load 220kg, Breaking Strain 1800kg
features: 220kg Max Load & 1800kg Breaking Strength – Durable and extremely strong with a maximum load capacity of 220kg and an 1800kg breaking strength, this poly rope makes light work of heavy-duty tasks and outdoor use.
12mm Diameter - The rope’s 12mm diameter strikes a balance between strength and pliability, offering enhanced strength and performance for a wide range of tough applications, withstanding heavy use.
Rot & Mildew Resistant - Designed to resist rotting and mildew to ensuring longevity, withstanding humid or wet environments.
Chemical Resistant - Perfect for a variety of industrial and household tasks where exposure to chemicals is possible.

Faithfull 5 Year Manufacturers Guarantee - Designed for versatility, durability and longevity, the Faithfull Blue Poly Rope delivers high performance in various home and workplace applications including tying down loads, for use as washing lines, securing outdoor gear and furniture, this rope stands up to demanding tasks.
description: Faithfull FAIRB30120 Blue Poly Rope Coil 12mm x 30M Max Load 220kg, 1800kg Breaking Strength. Suitable for a variety of applications in the home and workplace. Rot and Mildew Resistant, Chemical Restistant
